tools.name: get_brand_coherence
tools.description: Get the NES claim-vs-reality coherence signal for one brand: its website coherence score (the claim), recent public reality (matched news events), and the divergence between them. High divergence means the brand presents as coherent while its reality is turning negative. Directional opinion from pub

tools.name: compare_brands
tools.description: Compare the NES coherence signal for several brands side by side (claim, reality, divergence for each). Presents the data; it does NOT recommend one brand over another. The caller decides.
